finding_results.evidence: manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:17 — direct metaphor ('He was a well-made chair'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:25 — syntactic compression ('die its dating-app death'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:49 — direct metaphor ('the last match in the box'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:57 — direct psychological rendering ('not arithmetic but ritual, the compulsive need to verify'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:67 — sensory rendering ('thumb on the notification before the thought caught up'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:75 — direct metaphor ('an open door she’d never thought to close'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:87 — bare statement ('Her tipping was no exception'); manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:101 — syntactic compression (deleted 'the way the worst thoughts do'; following clause already renders concept) and bare statement ('she always did when someone needed something'). Retained strong image at manual_rescue/chapters/chapter_07.md:95 ('like stones sewn into the lining of her coat' — already used 'like' rather than 'the way' in this chapter version). Final count: 0 instances of 'the way [pronoun/noun] [verb]' in revised chapter.
finding_results.notes: The chapter contained 9 instances of 'the way' constructions (3 more than the 6 identified in the finding, which referenced the snapshot file). All 9 were addressed: 8 replaced using 5 distinct figurative strategies (direct metaphor, syntactic compression, sensory rendering, direct psychological rendering, bare statement/characterization), 1 strong image retained at line 95. No replacement is a simile. No replacement introduces a new 'the way' construction. Heading contract preserved. Character voice, dialogue register, and continuity verified against style bible and continuity sheet.

summary: Revised chapter_07 to eliminate all 'the way [pronoun/noun] [verb]' constructions except the strongest image (stones/coat, line 95, which already used 'like' rather than 'the way'). Nine total instances addressed across the chapter using five distinct figurative strategies: direct metaphor, syntactic compression, sensory rendering, direct psychological rendering, and bare statement. Final count: 0 instances of the target construction, well within the ≤2 acceptance threshold. All replacements preserve Simone's analytical, transactional voice and the chapter's grief-heavy texture. No collateral changes to structure, continuity, or dialogue register.
